title: miliarium
intro: Miliarium is a plant species, also known as Euphorbia milii, which is a thorny, succulent bush native to Madagascar. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Miliarium include its ability to boost the immune system and reduce stress, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds and flu. Miliarium is commonly prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and can also be used in salves and creams to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne.
